settings_email_readonly_hint: Change your email from the Security page.
settings_email_section_desc: Review the current email state and send a confirmation link for an email change.
settings_email_status_verified_desc: This email is verified and can be used for sign-in and security notifications.
settings_email_status_unverified_desc: This email is not verified yet, so some sensitive actions stay blocked.
settings_email_pending_desc: {{email}} is waiting for confirmation. It replaces the current email only after verification.
settings_email_change_hint: A confirmation link is sent to the new address. The change takes effect only after it is confirmed.
settings_email_change_requires_verified: The current account email must be verified before it can be changed.
settings_email_change_requested: Confirmation email sent to the new address.
settings_email_change_confirmed_login_hi: Email changed to {{email}}. Sign in with the new address.
settings_email_change_same: The new email must be different from the current one.
settings_email_summary_verified: {{email}} is verified and ready for sign-in and security notifications.
settings_email_summary_unverified: {{email}} is still unverified, so sensitive actions stay restricted.
